name: AI Financial Reporting
tagline: Automated financial insights, reporting, and tax-ready categorization
description: AI-powered financial reporting solution that automates transaction categorization, generates periodic financial reports with visualizations, estimates tax liabilities, and performs ROI analysis across business units. A single specialized financial analyst agent processes raw transaction data and produces executive-ready reports delivered via email on a configurable schedule.
prerequisites: Bank account or payment processor with transaction export (CSV, OFX, or API)
Chart of accounts or category taxonomy
Email distribution list for report recipients
